sections.headline: Tenant configured with verified domains
sections.plainEnglish: RTH Tech Services Inc. has 5 verified domains configured, with the default domain set to rthtechservices.com. The tenant was created in January 2021 and has 69 assigned service plans.
sections.businessImpact: The tenant is properly established and operational with multiple domains available for business use.
sections.recommendedAction: Periodically review domains and technical notification contacts to ensure they remain current and aligned to business needs.

sections.headline: Very high license quantity with minimal assignments
sections.plainEnglish: There are 1,050,005 total licenses recorded, but only 12 are assigned to users. Estimated annual cost is 480 CAD, with several SKUs missing pricing data.
sections.businessImpact: Large discrepancies between purchased and assigned counts may indicate reporting anomalies or misaligned license records.
sections.recommendedAction: Validate license quantities and SKU records with your licensing provider to ensure counts and billing are accurate.

sections.headline: Most users unlicensed and no sign-in data collected
sections.plainEnglish: Out of 15 total users (10 members and 5 guests), only 2 are licensed. Sign-in activity data has not been requested or collected.
sections.businessImpact: Lack of licensing and sign-in visibility limits insight into actual usage and potential security risks.
sections.recommendedAction: Enable sign-in activity reporting and review which users require licenses based on business roles.

sections.headline: Significant unused license count identified
sections.plainEnglish: There are 1,049,993 unused licenses recorded, with one item flagged for attention. No licensed users are disabled, stale, or guests.
sections.businessImpact: Excess unused licenses may create administrative complexity and indicate inaccurate license tracking.
sections.recommendedAction: Reconcile license inventory to confirm actual entitlements and remove or correct unnecessary allocations.

sections.headline: Mailbox forwarding enabled and one mailbox dominates storage
sections.plainEnglish: There are 9 mailboxes, including 4 shared mailboxes and 1 user mailbox. Two mailboxes have forwarding enabled, and the shared mailbox 'Escala' accounts for 186,719,050.60 GB of the reported 186,719,055.74 GB total storage.
sections.businessImpact: Mailbox forwarding can increase data exposure risk, and extreme mailbox size values may indicate reporting or configuration issues.
sections.recommendedAction: Review forwarding configurations for business justification and validate mailbox size reporting for accuracy.

sections.headline: SharePoint lightly used with no external sharing
sections.plainEnglish: There are 38 SharePoint sites using 22.12 GB of storage out of a 972,800 GB quota. No sites have external sharing enabled.
sections.businessImpact: Storage utilization is low and external sharing risk is minimized under current settings.
sections.recommendedAction: Continue monitoring storage growth and enable external sharing only where a defined business need exists.

sections.headline: Teams deployed but no recent activity
sections.plainEnglish: There are 3 private Teams, with 2 marked inactive and no recorded channel messages or meetings in the last 90 days.
sections.businessImpact: Low Teams activity may indicate underutilization of collaboration capabilities.
sections.recommendedAction: Assess whether Teams should be further adopted for collaboration or if unused Teams should be cleaned up.

sections.headline: Multiple stale devices and no compliance visibility
sections.plainEnglish: Nine devices are registered, with 5 marked as stale and 2 disabled. No devices are managed by Intune, and compliance status is unknown for all devices.
sections.businessImpact: Unmanaged and stale devices reduce visibility and may increase security risk.
sections.recommendedAction: Enable Intune management and review stale or disabled devices for removal or remediation.

sections.headline: Single Copilot license fully assigned
sections.plainEnglish: One Copilot license has been purchased and assigned, with an estimated monthly cost of 40 CAD. Usage reporting has not been requested.
sections.businessImpact: Without usage reporting, it is unclear whether the Copilot investment is delivering value.
sections.recommendedAction: Enable Copilot usage reporting to evaluate adoption and return on investment.
